title: Root Inc Q4 2024 Earnings: Strong Beat Drives Stock Surge
text: Root Inc. (NASDAQ: ROOT) delivered a significant earnings surprise in Q4 2024, reporting earnings per share of $1.30 against analyst expectations of a $0.52 loss. Revenue reached $326.7 million, surpassing the forecasted $291.34 million. The positive results triggered a 17.11% surge in after-hours trading. The insurance company achieved its first full year of net income profitability, generating $31 million in GAAP net income and $112 million in adjusted EBITDA. In the fourth quarter specifically, the company posted $22 million in net income—a $46 million year-over-year improvement. Root's gross combined ratio stood at 95% on $1.3 billion in gross premiums written. The company expanded its policy base by 21% annually to 414,000 policies and reduced reinsurance costs significantly. The company now covers 76% of the U.S. population following Minnesota's recent launch. Management highlighted success with the partnership channel, where new writings more than doubled in 2024, representing approximately one-third of Q4 new business. CEO Alex Timm emphasized the company's long-term approach: It's all about the long term and managing for lifetime customer value rather than quarterly earnings. Root projects low to mid-single-digit loss trends and expects selective rate decreases in certain geographies while maintaining disciplined underwriting practices.
